data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): .test-index concurrent edit risk with 651c-652f. Both tasks append to .test-index. Since 651c-652f has no dependency on 8307-3cd0, implement .test-index append for scale-inference RED markers BEFORE editing. When appending RED marker for complexity-gate, open .test-index in append mode — do NOT overwrite. Verify no duplicate entries exist after appending. Order: run 651c-652f first if sequential, or use atomic append if parallel.
